title: Agama Says Accountability, Transparency will Boost Investor Confidence - FinancialEDGE
description: The Director General of the Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC), Dr. Emomotimi Agama, has emphasized the importance of accountability and transparency as critical tools for strengthening investor confidence in Nigeria’s capital market. Dr. Agama stated this while delivering a goodwill message at a stakeholder engagement on internal control over financial reporting in the public sector.
html: The Director General of the Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC), Dr. Emomotimi Agama, has emphasized the importance of accountability and transparency as critical tools for strengthening investor confidence in Nigeria’s capital market.
